ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the frequencies table */,
  "emission_designator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the emission_designators table */,
  "transmit_receive_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transmit_receive_status table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site location */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., cell tower, satellite dish) */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the licenses table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was last updated */,
  "activated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was activated */,
  "deactivated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the site was deactivated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_value" TEXT /* Value of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency usage */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band the frequency belongs to */,
  "allocated_to" TEXT /* Entity or service the frequency is allocated to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_designators" (
  "designator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission designator */,
  "designator_code" TEXT /* Code representing the emission designator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission designator */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission (e.g., radio, microwave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmit_receive_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code for the status (T or R) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_no" TEXT /* License number associated with the site */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the license */,
  "issued_to" TEXT /* Name of the entity to whom the license was issued */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., fixed, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., inspector, operator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the site data */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., compliance, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being read */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was taken */,
  "emission_level" TEXT /* Emission level of the site */,
  "frequency_drift" TEXT /* Frequency drift of the site */,
  "signal_strength" TEXT /* Signal strength of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site related to the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., license, permit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)
